files.mg_00661.v:
module mg_00661(input [31:0] mem_data_out,input [1:0] mem_addr_in,input [5:0] IR_out,output reg [31:0] mem_data_shift,output reg [3:0] Rd_write_byte_en);
always @ (*) 
 begin 
  if (IR_out == 6'b100011)begin 
  mem_data_shift = mem_data_out; 
  Rd_write_byte_en=4'b1111; 
  end 
  else begin 
  case (mem_addr_in) 
  2'b00: begin mem_data_shift = mem_data_out; Rd_write_byte_en=4'b1111;end 
  2'b01: begin mem_data_shift = {mem_data_out[23:0], 8'b0};Rd_write_byte_en=4'b1110; end 
  2'b10: begin mem_data_shift = {mem_data_out[15:0], 16'b0};Rd_write_byte_en=4'b1100; end 
  2'b11: begin mem_data_shift = {mem_data_out[7:0], 24'b0};Rd_write_byte_en=4'b1000; end 
  endcase 
  end 
 end 
 endmodule

always @ (*) 
 begin 
  if (IR_out == 6'b100011)begin 
  mem_data_shift = mem_data_out; 
  Rd_write_byte_en=4'b1111; 
  end

  case (mem_addr_in)

  2'b11: begin mem_data_shift = {mem_data_out[7:0], 24'b0};Rd_write_byte_en=4'b1000; end

files.origen_189240.v:
module origen_189240(
    input signed [25:0] out1,
    input signed [25:0] out2,
    input signed [25:0] out3,
    input signed [25:0] out4,
    input signed [25:0] out5,
    input signed [25:0] out6,
    input signed [25:0] out7,
    input signed [25:0] out8,
    input signed [25:0] out9,
    input signed [25:0] out10,
    output reg [3:0] max
);

always @(*) begin
    if (out1 >= out2 && out1 >= out3 && out1 >= out4 && out1 >= out5 && out1 >= out6 && out1 >= out7 && out1 >= out8 && out1 >= out9 && out1 >= out10) begin
        max = 4'b0000;
    end
    else if (out2 >= out1 && out2 >= out3 && out2 >= out4 && out2 >= out5 && out2 >= out6 && out2 >= out7 && out2 >= out8 && out2 >= out9 && out2 >= out10) begin
        max = 4'b0001;
    end
    else if (out3 >= out1 && out3 >= out2 && out3 >= out4 && out3 >= out5 && out3 >= out6 && out3 >= out7 && out3 >= out8 && out3 >= out9 && out3 >= out10) begin
        max = 4'b0010;
    end
    else if (out4 >= out1 && out4 >= out2 && out4 >= out3 && out4 >= out5 && out4 >= out6 && out4 >= out7 && out4 >= out8 && out4 >= out9 && out4 >= out10) begin
        max = 4'b0011;
    end
    else if (out5 >= out1 && out5 >= out2 && out5 >= out3 && out5 >= out4 && out5 >= out6 && out5 >= out7 && out5 >= out8 && out5 >= out9 && out5 >= out10) begin
        max = 4'b0100;
    end
    else if (out6 >= out1 && out6 >= out2 && out6 >= out3 && out6 >= out4 && out6 >= out5 && out6 >= out7 && out6 >= out8 && out6 >= out9 && out6 >= out10) begin
        max = 4'b0101;
    end
    else if (out7 >= out1 && out7 >= out2 && out7 >= out3 && out7 >= out4 && out7 >= out5 && out7 >= out6 && out7 >= out8 && out7 >= out9 && out7 >= out10) begin
        max = 4'b0110;
    end
    else if (out8 >= out1 && out8 >= out2 && out8 >= out3 && out8 >= out4 && out8 >= out5 && out8 >= out6 && out8 >= out7 && out8 >= out9 && out8 >= out10) begin
        max = 4'b0111;
    end
    else if (out9 >= out1 && out9 >= out2 && out9 >= out3 && out9 >= out4 && out9 >= out5 && out9 >= out6 && out9 >= out7 && out9 >= out8 && out9 >= out10) begin
        max = 4'b1000;
    end
    else if (out10 >= out1 && out10 >= out2 && out10 >= out3 && out10 >= out4 && out10 >= out5 && out10 >= out6 && out10 >= out7 && out10 >= out8 && out10 >= out9) begin
        max = 4'b1001;
    end
    else begin
        max = 4'b0000;
    end
end

endmodule

files.rtlpp_01557.v:
module rtlpp_01557 (
	clk,
	rstn,
	sample,
	raw_data_in,
	ave_data_out,
    data_out_valid);

parameter 
ADC_WIDTH = 8,				
LPF_DEPTH_BITS = 4;         


input	clk;                                
input	rstn;	                            
input	sample;				                
input	[ADC_WIDTH-1:0]	raw_data_in;		


output [ADC_WIDTH-1:0]	ave_data_out;		
output data_out_valid;                      

reg [ADC_WIDTH-1:0]	ave_data_out;		





reg [ADC_WIDTH+LPF_DEPTH_BITS-1:0]      accum;          
reg [LPF_DEPTH_BITS-1:0]                count;          
reg [ADC_WIDTH-1:0]  					raw_data_d1;    

reg sample_d1, sample_d2;                               
reg result_valid;                                       
wire accumulate;                                        
wire latch_result;                                      






always @(posedge clk or negedge rstn)
begin
	if( rstn == 1'b0 ) begin
		sample_d1 <= 1'b0;	
		sample_d2 <= 1'b0;
        raw_data_d1 <= {ADC_WIDTH{1'b0}};
		result_valid <= 1'b0;
	end else begin
		sample_d1 <= sample;                
		sample_d2 <= sample_d1;             
		raw_data_d1 <= raw_data_in; 	    
		result_valid <= latch_result;		
	end
end

assign		accumulate = sample_d1 && !sample_d2;	    
assign		latch_result = accumulate && (count == {LPF_DEPTH_BITS{1'b0}});	






always @(posedge clk or negedge rstn)
begin
	if( rstn == 1'b0 ) begin
		count <= {LPF_DEPTH_BITS{1'b0}};	  
	end else begin
	    if (accumulate)	count <= count + 1;         
	end
end







always @(posedge clk or negedge rstn)
begin
	if( rstn == 1'b0 ) begin
		accum <= {ADC_WIDTH+LPF_DEPTH_BITS{1'b0}};	
	end else begin
        if (accumulate)
            if(count == {LPF_DEPTH_BITS{1'b0}})                      
    		    accum <= raw_data_d1;           
            else
                accum <= accum + raw_data_d1;   
	end	
end
	







always @(posedge clk or negedge rstn)
begin
	if( rstn == 1'b0 ) begin
        ave_data_out <= {ADC_WIDTH{1'b0}};
    end else if (latch_result) begin            
        ave_data_out <= accum >> LPF_DEPTH_BITS;	  
    end
end

assign data_out_valid = result_valid;       

endmodule

module origen_147708 #(
    parameter BASEADDR = 32'h0000,
    parameter HIGHADDR = 32'hFFFF,
    parameter ABUSWIDTH = 16,
    parameter OUTPUTS = 8,
    parameter CMD_MEM_SIZE = 1024
) (
    input wire BUS_CLK,
    input wire BUS_RST,
    input wire [ABUSWIDTH-1:0] BUS_ADD,
    inout wire [7:0] BUS_DATA,
    input wire BUS_RD,
    input wire BUS_WR,
    input wire CMD_CLK_IN,
    input wire CMD_EXT_START_FLAG,
    output wire [OUTPUTS-1:0] CMD_DATA,
    output wire CMD_READY,
    output wire CMD_START_FLAG
);

    wire IP_RD, IP_WR;
    wire [ABUSWIDTH-1:0] IP_ADD;
    wire [7:0] IP_DATA_IN, IP_DATA_OUT;

    bus_to_ip #(
        .BASEADDR(BASEADDR),
        .HIGHADDR(HIGHADDR),
        .ABUSWIDTH(ABUSWIDTH)
    ) i_bus_to_ip (
        .BUS_RD(BUS_RD),
        .BUS_WR(BUS_WR),
        .BUS_ADD(BUS_ADD),
        .BUS_DATA(BUS_DATA),
        .IP_RD(IP_RD),
        .IP_WR(IP_WR),
        .IP_ADD(IP_ADD),
        .IP_DATA_IN(IP_DATA_IN),
        .IP_DATA_OUT(IP_DATA_OUT)
    );

    wire CMD_CLK_OUT;
    wire CMD_EXT_START_ENABLE;

    cmd_seq_core #(
        .ABUSWIDTH(ABUSWIDTH),
        .OUTPUTS(OUTPUTS),
        .CMD_MEM_SIZE(CMD_MEM_SIZE)
    ) i_cmd_seq_core (
        .BUS_CLK(BUS_CLK),
        .BUS_RST(BUS_RST),
        .BUS_ADD(IP_ADD),
        .BUS_DATA_IN(IP_DATA_OUT),
        .BUS_RD(IP_RD),
        .BUS_WR(IP_WR),
        .BUS_DATA_OUT(IP_DATA_IN),
        .CMD_CLK_OUT(CMD_CLK_OUT),
        .CMD_CLK_IN(CMD_CLK_IN),
        .CMD_EXT_START_FLAG(CMD_EXT_START_FLAG),
        .CMD_EXT_START_ENABLE(CMD_EXT_START_ENABLE),
        .CMD_DATA(CMD_DATA),
        .CMD_READY(CMD_READY),
        .CMD_START_FLAG(CMD_START_FLAG)
    );

endmodule

files.autovcoder_086108.v:
module autovcoder_086108 (
    input RESET,
    input CLOCK,
    input [3:0] PUSH_BUTTONS,
    // 0: rechts, 1: unten, 2: oben, 3: links
    output [1:0] STATE_OUT
);

  reg [1:0] CurrState;
  reg [1:0] NextState;

  assign STATE_OUT = CurrState;

  // synchronous logic
  always @(posedge CLOCK) begin
    if (RESET) begin
      CurrState <= 2'b00;  // the right state
    end else begin
      CurrState <= NextState;
    end
  end

  // asynchronous logic
  always @(PUSH_BUTTONS or CurrState) begin
    case (CurrState)
      2'b00: begin  // the right direction
        if (PUSH_BUTTONS[1]) NextState <= 2'b01;  // go down 
        else if (PUSH_BUTTONS[2]) NextState <= 2'b10;  // go up		
        else NextState <= CurrState;
      end
      3'b01: begin  // the down state
        if (PUSH_BUTTONS[0]) NextState <= 2'b00;  // go right 
        else if (PUSH_BUTTONS[3]) NextState <= 2'b11;  // go left	
        else NextState <= CurrState;
      end
      2'b10: begin  // the up direction
        if (PUSH_BUTTONS[0]) NextState <= 2'b00;  // go right 
        else if (PUSH_BUTTONS[3]) NextState <= 2'b11;  // go left		
        else NextState <= CurrState;
      end
      2'b11: begin  // the left state
        if (PUSH_BUTTONS[1]) NextState <= 2'b01;  // go down 
        else if (PUSH_BUTTONS[2]) NextState <= 2'b10;  // go up		
        else NextState <= CurrState;
      end
    endcase
  end

endmodule

files.origen_220933.v:
module origen_220933(
    input           clk,
    input           rst,
    input           mfc0,
    input           mtc0,
    input [31:0]    pc,
    input [4:0]     Rd,
    input [31:0]    wdata,
    input           exception,
    input           eret,
    input [4:0]     cause,
    input           intr,
    output [31:0]   rdata,
    output [31:0]   status,
    output          timer_int,
    output [31:0]   exc_addr
);

    reg [31:0] reg_file [0:31];

    initial begin
        reg_file[12] = 32'hf;
    end

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            reg_file[12] <= 32'hf;
            for (integer i = 0; i < 32; i = i + 1) begin
                if (i != 12) begin
                    reg_file[i] <= 0;
                end
            end
        end
        else begin
            if (mtc0) begin
                reg_file[Rd] <= wdata;
            end
            if (exception && reg_file[12][0]) begin
                reg_file[14] <= pc;
                reg_file[12][0] <= 0;
            end
            if (eret) begin
                reg_file[12][0] <= 1;
            end
        end
    end

    assign rdata = reg_file[Rd];
    assign status = reg_file[12];
    assign timer_int = reg_file[12][1];
    assign exc_addr = (exception && reg_file[12][0]) ? 32'h00400004 : 32'b0;

endmodule
files.sec_origen_220933.tcl:

files.origen_034201.v:
module origen_034201 (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire mfc0,
    input wire [4:0] addr,
    input wire mtc0,
    input wire [31:0] data,
    input wire exception,
    input wire eret,
    input wire [31:0] pc,
    input wire [3:0] cause,
    output reg [31:0] CP0_out,
    output wire [31:0] status,
    output wire [31:0] epc_out
);

    reg [31:0] memory [0:31];
    reg in_exception;

    wire valid_exception = exception && 
        ((cause == 4'b1000 && memory[12][1]) || // Syscall
         (cause == 4'b1001 && memory[12][2]) || // Breakpoint
         (cause == 4'b1101 && memory[12][3]));  // Trap

    assign status = memory[12];
    assign epc_out = memory[14];

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            memory[12] <= 32'h0000000f; // Status register
            memory[13] <= 32'h0; // Cause register
            memory[14] <= 32'h0; // EPC register
            in_exception <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            if (valid_exception && !in_exception) begin
                memory[12] <= {memory[12][26:0], 5'b0}; // Shift Status left
                memory[13][6:2] <= cause; // Update Cause
                memory[14] <= pc - 32'h4; // Save PC to EPC
                in_exception <= 1'b1;
            end else if (eret) begin
                memory[12] <= {5'b0, memory[12][31:5]}; // Shift Status right
                in_exception <= 1'b0;
            end

            if (mtc0) begin
                memory[addr] <= data;
            end

            if (mfc0) begin
                CP0_out <= memory[addr];
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
